title: ARCHITECTURAL COORDINATORS x 2 (1 for Condo / 1 for Mixed Use Project)
description:
ARCHITECTURAL COORDINATORS x 2 (1 for Condo / 1 for Mixed Use Project)

As an Architectural Coordinators, do you like to have a positive impact and effect in the smooth running of a crucial project?

Do you want to work for a company who work on some of the biggest projects in Singapore, and have the reputation as the employer of choice?

Our client is one of the leading Building contractors in Singapore. They have a number of current large scale ground breaking projects with tenders in place for some of Singapore’s most prestigious upcoming projects.


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

  • Supervise architectural façade works    
  • Coordinate with the sub-contractors and clients   
  • Gathering the design for all related façade from project specifications, construction drawings and some technical clarifications   
  • Responsible for work in all phases in Mixed Use Development & Condo Project
  • Handle cost control, work scheduling, project supervision, material requisitions and documentation   
  • To liaise with Site Engineers, Consultants, Architects & Suppliers   
  • Coordinate project activities, daily progress reports and able to supervise a group of contractors   


SALARY/BENEFITS:

  • Negotiable depending on experience.  My client has indicated that the key is to get the right individual first and the salary will reflect this and remain highly competitive.
  • Working Condition: 5.5 Days
  • Placement: Permanent
  • Work location: Singapore
  • Training and Continued Professional Development
  • Tailored individual career plan
  • Fantastic working environment, a real team mentality
  • Opportunity to work on cutting edge projects.


PRE-REQUISITES:

  • Diploma/Degree in Architecture or any relevant qualification.
  • Minimum 3-5 years in Architectural experience for large scale projects.
  • Knowledge in Architectural Planning and Detailing, supervisory experience in architectural works on site.
  • Must have worked on Singapore building projects - Offices, Hotels, Residential (Condo/Landed Housing/HDB) or ideally Mixed Use Developments.
  • Knowledge with local building regulations and by-laws.
  • Experienced in preparation of architectural details and coordination.
  • Candidate to be flexible on working hours.
  • Excellent project skills, good communication & interpersonal skills.
  • Highly self-motivated, good working attitude with a high level of professionalism and integrity.
  • Good team player and adaptable to a dynamic environment.


HOW TO APPLY:

Must Indicate:

  • Detailed resume
  • Availability or Notice Period to serve,
  • Reason for Leaving,
  • Current and Expected Salary

For the exceptional position offered, please email your resume to:

Babs Khanduja – babs@phoenix-recruit.com

Dial: +65 64634941

I am able to provide an up-to-date market appraisal on current jobs and associated salary’s. Contact me for a confidential discussion.

Refer a friend or colleague to Phoenix Recruitment today. If we place them into a job, you will receive SGD $588 (per referral)

*Contact your Consultant for full terms

MOM Registered Employment Agency:  20C0113

Employment Agency Personnel Registration No.:  R1100441

postedCompany.description:
Who We Are

Recruitment specialists for the Built Environment including Civil Engineering, Building, Architecture & Interior Design sectors.

Our Background

Over 35 years specialist Built Environment & Design experience recruiting in Singapore, Hong Kong, UK & the wider APAC region.  Extensive experience working with Main Contractors, Sub-Contractors, Engineering Consultants, PM/QS /FM Consultants, Developers, Architects, Interior Designers & Fit-Out Contractors.

Our Approach

Professional, consultative and results driven approach designed to achieve a win/win scenario for all 3 parties involved, Client, Candidate & Consultant.  We strive to over deliver in our service to our clients & candidates, please get in touch today to learn how.
